[Token_Usage] BackendDeveloper-Failover-Enhanced: Input=14461, Output=4530, Total=18991
[Tool_Request] BackendDeveloper-Failover-Enhanced: write_text_file({"filename":"app.py","content":"from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request\nimport os\n\napp = Flask(__name__)\napp.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'\n\nDATA_DIR = 'data'\n\n# Helper functions to load data files with safe parsing and error handling\n\ndef load_current_weather():\n    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'current_weather.txt')\n    current_weather_list = []\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                # location_id|location_name|temperature|condition|humidity|wind_speed|last_updated\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 7:\n                    continue\n                try:\n                    location_id = int(parts[0])\n                    location_name = parts[1]\n                    temperature = float(parts[2]) if '.' in parts[2] else int(parts[2])\n                    condition = parts[3]\n                    humidity = int(parts[4])\n                    wind_speed = float(parts[5]) if '.' in parts[5] else int(parts[5])\n                    last_updated = parts[6]\n                    current_weather_list.append({\n                        'location_id': location_id,\n                        'location_name': location_name,\n                        'temperature': temperature,\n                        'condition': condition,\n                        'humidity': humidity,\n                        'wind_speed': wind_speed,\n                        'last_updated': last_updated\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        # Return empty list on missing file\n        return []\n    return current_weather_list\n\n\ndef load_forecasts():\n    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'forecasts.txt')\n    forecasts = []\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                # forecast_id|location_id|date|high_temp|low_temp|condition|precipitation|humidity\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 8:\n                    continue\n                try:\n                    forecast_id = int(parts[0])\n                    location_id = int(parts[1])\n                    date = parts[2]\n                    high_temp = float(parts[3]) if '.' in parts[3] else int(parts[3])\n                    low_temp = float(parts[4]) if '.' in parts[4] else int(parts[4])\n                    condition = parts[5]\n                    precipitation = int(parts[6])\n                    humidity = int(parts[7])\n                    forecasts.append({\n                        'forecast_id': forecast_id,\n                        'location_id': location_id,\n                        'date': date,\n                        'high_temp': high_temp,\n                        'low_temp': low_temp,\n                        'condition': condition,\n                        'precipitation': precipitation,\n                        'humidity': humidity\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        return []\n    return forecasts\n\n\ndef load_locations():\n    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'locations.txt')\n    locations = []\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                # location_id|location_name|latitude|longitude|country|timezone\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 6:\n                    continue\n                try:\n                    location_id = int(parts[0])\n                    location_name = parts[1]\n                    latitude = float(parts[2])\n                    longitude = float(parts[3])\n                    country = parts[4]\n                    timezone = parts[5]\n                    locations.append({\n                        'location_id': location_id,\n                        'location_name': location_name,\n                        'latitude': latitude,\n                        'longitude': longitude,\n                        'country': country,\n                        'timezone': timezone\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        return []\n    return locations\n\n\ndef load_alerts():\n    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'alerts.txt')\n    alerts = []\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                # alert_id|location_id|alert_type|severity|description|start_time|end_time|is_acknowledged\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 8:\n                    continue\n                try:\n                    alert_id = int(parts[0])\n                    location_id = int(parts[1])\n                    alert_type = parts[2]\n                    severity = parts[3]\n                    description = parts[4]\n                    start_time = parts[5]\n                    end_time = parts[6]\n                    is_acknowledged = parts[7] == '1'\n                    alerts.append({\n                        'alert_id': alert_id,\n                        'location_id': location_id,\n                        'alert_type': alert_type,\n                        'severity': severity,\n                        'description': description,\n                        'start_time': start_time,\n                        'end_time': end_time,\n                        'is_acknowledged': is_acknowledged\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        return []\n    return alerts\n\n\ndef load_air_quality():\n    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'air_quality.txt')\n    air_quality_list = []\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                # aqi_id|location_id|aqi_index|pm25|pm10|no2|o3|last_updated\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 8:\n                    continue\n                try:\n                    aqi_id = int(parts[0])\n                    location_id = int(parts[1])\n                    aqi_index = int(parts[2])\n                    pm25 = float(parts[3])\n                    pm10 = float(parts[4])\n                    no2 = float(parts[5])\n                    o3 = float(parts[6])\n                    last_updated = parts[7]\n                    air_quality_list.append({\n                        'aqi_id': aqi_id,\n                        'location_id': location_id,\n                        'aqi_index': aqi_index,\n                        'pm25': pm25,\n                        'pm10': pm10,\n                        'no2': no2,\n                        'o3': o3,\n                        'last_updated': last_updated\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        return []\n    return air_quality_list\n\n\ndef load_saved_locations():\n    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'saved_locations.txt')\n    saved_locations = []\n    try:\n        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                # saved_id|user_id|location_id|location_name|is_default\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 5:\n                    continue\n                try:\n                    saved_id = int(parts[0])\n                    user_id = int(parts[1])\n                    if user_id != 1:\n                        # ignore other users as per spec\n                        continue\n                    location_id = int(parts[2])\n                    location_name = parts[3]\n                    is_default = parts[4] == '1'\n                    saved_locations.append({\n                        'saved_id': saved_id,\n                        'location_id': location_id,\n                        'location_name': location_name,\n                        'is_default': is_default\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        return []\n    return saved_locations\n\n\ndef get_location_by_id(locations, location_id):\n    for loc in locations:\n        if loc['location_id'] == location_id:\n            return loc\n    return None\n\n\ndef get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, location_id):\n    for cw in current_weather_list:\n        if cw['location_id'] == location_id:\n            return cw\n    return None\n\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef root_redirect():\n    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))\n\n\n@app.route('/dashboard', methods=['GET'])\ndef dashboard():\n    # Load saved locations to find default location\n    saved_locations = load_saved_locations()\n    default_location = None\n    for loc in saved_locations:\n        if loc['is_default']:\n            default_location = loc\n            break\n\n    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()\n\n    current_weather = None\n    if default_location:\n        current_weather = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, default_location['location_id'])\n\n    # If no default or no current weather found, try fallback to first current weather\n    if not current_weather and current_weather_list:\n        current_weather = current_weather_list[0]\n\n    # If still None, provide empty dict with all keys None\n    if not current_weather:\n        current_weather = {\n            'location_id': None,\n            'location_name': '',\n            'temperature': None,\n            'condition': '',\n            'humidity': None,\n            'wind_speed': None,\n            'last_updated': ''\n        }\n\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', current_weather=current_weather)\n\n\n@app.route('/weather/current/<int:location_id>', methods=['GET'])\ndef current_weather(location_id):\n    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()\n    cw = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, location_id)\n    if cw is None:\n        # Provide empty defaults\n        context = {\n            'location_name': '',\n            'temperature': None,\n            'condition': '',\n            'humidity': None,\n            'wind_speed': None\n        }\n    else:\n        context = {\n            'location_name': cw['location_name'],\n            'temperature': cw['temperature'],\n            'condition': cw['condition'],\n            'humidity': cw['humidity'],\n            'wind_speed': cw['wind_speed']\n        }\n    return render_template('current_weather.html', **context)\n\n\n@app.route('/forecast/weekly', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef weekly_forecast():\n    locations = load_locations()\n    forecasts = load_forecasts()\n\n    selected_location_id = None\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_filter')\n        if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():\n            selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)\n    \n    # Prepare list of locations with needed fields\n    locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]\n\n    filtered_forecasts = []\n    for fc in forecasts:\n        if selected_location_id is None or fc['location_id'] == selected_location_id:\n            filtered_forecasts.append({\n                'date': fc['date'],\n                'high_temp': fc['high_temp'],\n                'low_temp': fc['low_temp'],\n                'condition': fc['condition']\n            })\n\n    return render_template('weekly_forecast.html',\n                           locations=locations_for_select,\n                           selected_location_id=selected_location_id,\n                           forecasts=filtered_forecasts)\n\n\n@app.route('/locations/search', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef location_search():\n    locations = load_locations()\n    saved_locations = load_saved_locations()\n    saved_locations_list = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in saved_locations]\n\n    search_query = ''\n    search_results = []\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        search_query = request.form.get('search_query', '').strip()\n        if search_query:\n            # Case insensitive substring search in location_name\n            for loc in locations:\n                if search_query.lower() in loc['location_name'].lower():\n                    search_results.append({\n                        'location_id': loc['location_id'],\n                        'location_name': loc['location_name'],\n                        'latitude': loc['latitude'],\n                        'longitude': loc['longitude'],\n                        'country': loc['country']\n                    })\n\n    return render_template('location_search.html',\n                           search_query=search_query,\n                           search_results=search_results,\n                           saved_locations=saved_locations_list)\n\n\n@app.route('/alerts', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef weather_alerts():\n    alerts = load_alerts()\n    locations = load_locations()\n\n    severity_filter = 'All'\n    location_filter = None\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        severity_filter_in = request.form.get('severity_filter')\n        location_filter_in = request.form.get('location_filter')\n        if severity_filter_in in ('All', 'Critical', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'):\n            severity_filter = severity_filter_in\n        if location_filter_in and location_filter_in.isdigit():\n            location_filter = int(location_filter_in)\n        else:\n            location_filter = None\n\n    # Filter alerts\n    filtered_alerts = []\n    for alert in alerts:\n        if severity_filter != 'All' and alert['severity'] != severity_filter:\n            continue\n        if location_filter is not None and alert['location_id'] != location_filter:\n            continue\n        # attach location_name\n        location_name = ''\n        loc = get_location_by_id(locations, alert['location_id'])\n        if loc:\n            location_name = loc['location_name']\n        alert_copy = alert.copy()\n        alert_copy['location_name'] = location_name\n        filtered_alerts.append(alert_copy)\n\n    return render_template('alerts.html',\n                           alerts=filtered_alerts,\n                           severity_filter=severity_filter,\n                           location_filter=location_filter)\n\n\n@app.route('/airquality', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef air_quality():\n    locations = load_locations()\n    air_quality_list = load_air_quality()\n\n    selected_location_id = None\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_aqi_filter')\n        if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():\n            selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)\n\n    # Prepare list of locations for dropdown\n    locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]\n\n    # Find air quality data for selected location\n    aqi_data = None\n    if selected_location_id is not None:\n        for aqi in air_quality_list:\n            if aqi['location_id'] == selected_location_id:\n                aqi_data = aqi\n                break\n    else:\n        # fallback to first if present\n        if air_quality_list:\n            aqi_data = air_quality_list[0]\n\n    if aqi_data is None:\n        aqi_data = {\n            'aqi_index': None,\n            'aqi_description': '',\n            'pm25': None,\n            'pm10': None,\n            'no2': None,\n            'o3': None,\n            'last_updated': ''\n        }\n    else:\n        # derive aqi_description from aqi_index\n        aqi_index = aqi_data['aqi_index']\n        if aqi_index is None:\n            aqi_description = ''\n        elif aqi_index <= 50:\n            aqi_description = 'Good'\n        elif aqi_index <= 100:\n            aqi_description = 'Moderate'\n        elif aqi_index <= 150:\n            aqi_description = 'Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups'\n        elif aqi_index <= 200:\n            aqi_description = 'Unhealthy'\n        elif aqi_index <= 300:\n            aqi_description = 'Very Unhealthy'\n        else:\n            aqi_description = 'Hazardous'\n        aqi_data['aqi_description'] = aqi_description\n\n    # Health recommendation based on AQI index\n    health_recommendation = ''\n    if aqi_data['aqi_index'] is None:\n        health_recommendation = 'No air quality data available.'\n    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 50:\n        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is considered satisfactory, and air pollution poses little or no risk.'\n    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 100:\n        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is acceptable; some pollutants may be a moderate health concern for a very small number of people.'\n    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 150:\n        health_recommendation = 'Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects. General public is less likely to be affected.'\n    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 200:\n        health_recommendation = 'Everyone may begin to experience health effects; members of sensitive groups may experience more serious effects.'\n    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 300:\n        health_recommendation = 'Health warnings of emergency conditions. The entire population is more likely to be affected.'\n    else:\n        health_recommendation = 'Health alert: everyone may experience more serious health effects.'\n\n    return render_template('air_quality.html',\n                           locations=locations_for_select,\n                           selected_location_id=selected_location_id,\n                           aqi_data=aqi_data,\n                           health_recommendation=health_recommendation)\n\n\n@app.route('/locations/saved', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef saved_locations():\n    saved_locations_raw = load_saved_locations()\n    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()\n\n    saved_locations_list = []\n    for loc in saved_locations_raw:\n        weather = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, loc['location_id'])\n        current_temperature = weather['temperature'] if weather else None\n        condition = weather['condition'] if weather else ''\n        saved_locations_list.append({\n            'location_id': loc['location_id'],\n            'location_name': loc['location_name'],\n            'current_temperature': current_temperature,\n            'condition': condition,\n            'is_default': loc['is_default']\n        })\n\n    # POST to remove location or set new default could be implemented here if needed, but spec does not detail\n    # For now ignoring POST since not specified what to do\n    \n    return render_template('saved_locations.html', saved_locations=saved_locations_list)\n\n\n@app.route('/settings', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef settings():\n    temperature_units = ['Celsius', 'Fahrenheit', 'Kelvin']\n\n    saved_locations_raw = load_saved_locations()\n    saved_locations_list = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in saved_locations_raw]\n\n    # Dummy defaults since no preferences file specified\n    selected_unit = 'Celsius'\n    default_location_id = None\n    alert_notifications_enabled = False\n\n    # Attempt to find default location id from saved locations\n    for loc in saved_locations_raw:\n        if loc['is_default']:\n            default_location_id = loc['location_id']\n            break\n\n    # POST data handling to save changes is not specified so ignoring changes\n\n    return render_template('settings.html',\n                           temperature_units=temperature_units,\n                           selected_unit=selected_unit,\n                           saved_locations=saved_locations_list,\n                           default_location_id=default_location_id,\n                           alert_notifications_enabled=alert_notifications_enabled)\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)\n"})

aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 50:\n        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is considered satisfactory, and air pollution poses little or no risk.'\n    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 100:\n health_recommendation = 'Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects.   @app.route('/') def root_redirect():     return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))   @app.route('/dashboard', methods=['GET']) def dashboard():     saved_locations = load_saved_locations() search_results.append({                         'location_id': loc['location_id'],                         'location_name': loc['location_name'],                         'latitude': loc['latitude'],                         'longitude': loc['longitude'],                         'country': loc['country']                     })      return render_template('location_search.html',                            search_query=search_query,                            search_results=search_results,                            saved_locations=saved_locations_list)   @app.route('/alerts', methods=['GET', 'POST']) def weather_alerts():     alerts = load_alerts()     locations = load_locations()      severity_filter = 'All'     location_filter = None      if request.method == 'POST':         severity_filter_in = request.form.get('severity_filter')         location_filter_in = request.form.get('location_filter')         if severity_filter_in in ('All', 'Critical', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'):             severity_filter = severity_filter_in         if location_filter_in and location_filter_in.isdigit():             location_filter = int(location_filter_in)         else:             location_filter = None      filtered_alerts = []     for alert in alerts:         if severity_filter != 'All' and alert['severity'] != severity_filter:             continue         if location_filter is not None and alert['location_id'] != location_filter:             continue         location_name = ''         loc = get_location_by_id(locations, alert['location_id'])         if loc:             location_name = loc['location_name']         alert_copy = alert.copy()         alert_copy['location_name'] = location_name         filtered_alerts.append(alert_copy)      return render_template('alerts.html',                            alerts=filtered_alerts,                            severity_filter=severity_filter,                            location_filter=location_filter)   @app.route('/airquality', methods=['GET', 'POST']) def air_quality():     locations = load_locations()     air_quality_list = load_air_quality()      selected_location_id = None     if request.method == 'POST':         loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_aqi_filter')         if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():             selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)      locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]      aqi_data = None     if selected_location_id is not None:         for aqi in air_quality_list:             if aqi['location_id'] == selected_location_id:                 aqi_data = aqi                 break     else:         if air_quality_list:             aqi_data = air_quality_list[0]      if aqi_data is None:         aqi_data = {             'aqi_index': None,             'aqi_description': '',             'pm25': None,             'pm10': None,             'no2': None,             'o3': None,             'last_updated': ''         }     else:         aqi_index = aqi_data['aqi_index']         if aqi_index is None:             aqi_description = ''         elif aqi_index <= 50:             aqi_description = 'Good'         elif aqi_index <= 100:             aqi_description = 'Moderate'         elif aqi_index <= 150:             aqi_description = 'Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups'         elif aqi_index <= 200:             aqi_description = 'Unhealthy'         elif aqi_index <= 300:             aqi_description = 'Very Unhealthy'         else:             aqi_description = 'Hazardous'         aqi_data['aqi_description'] = aqi_description      health_recommendation = ''     if aqi_data['aqi_index'] is None:         health_recommendation = 'No air quality data available.'     elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 50:         health_recommendation = 'Air quality is considered satisfactory, and air pollution poses little or no risk.'     elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 100:         health_recommendation = 'Air quality is acceptable; some pollutants may be a moderate health concern for a very small number of people.'     elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 150:         health_recommendation = 'Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects. General public is less likely to be affected.'     elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 200:         health_recommendation = 'Everyone may begin to experience health effects; members of sensitive groups may experience more serious effects.'     elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 300:         health_recommendation = 'Health warnings of emergency conditions. The entire population is more likely to be affected.'     else:         health_recommendation = 'Health alert: everyone may experience more serious health effects.'      return render_template('air_quality.html',                            locations=locations_for_select,                            selected_location_id=selected_location_id, 1. [12:12:26] LLM_CALL
   Input: Perform comprehensive functional and integration testing of app.py, templates/*.html, and design_spec.md; produce test_report.md and test_approval_status with [APPROVED] or NEED_MODIFY
=== app.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request
import os

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'

DATA_DIR = 'data'

# Helper functions to load data files safely with error handling and proper parsing

def load_current_weather():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'current_weather.txt')
    current_weather_list = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 7:
                    continue
                try:
                    location_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_name = parts[1]
                    temperature = float(parts[2]) if '.' in parts[2] else int(parts[2])
                    condition = parts[3]
                    humidity = int(parts[4])
                    wind_speed = float(parts[5]) if '.' in parts[5] else int(parts[5])
                    last_updated = parts[6]
                    current_weather_list.append({
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'location_name': location_name,
                        'temperature': temperature,
                        'condition': condition,
                        'humidity': humidity,
                        'wind_speed': wind_speed,
                        'last_updated': last_updated
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return current_weather_list


def load_forecasts():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'forecasts.txt')
    forecasts = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                try:
                    forecast_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_id = int(parts[1])
                    date = parts[2]
                    high_temp = float(parts[3]) if '.' in parts[3] else int(parts[3])
                    low_temp = float(parts[4]) if '.' in parts[4] else int(parts[4])
                    condition = parts[5]
                    precipitation = int(parts[6])
                    humidity = int(parts[7])
                    forecasts.append({
                        'forecast_id': forecast_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'date': date,
                        'high_temp': high_temp,
                        'low_temp': low_temp,
                        'condition': condition,
                        'precipitation': precipitation,
                        'humidity': humidity
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return forecasts


def load_locations():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'locations.txt')
    locations = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 6:
                    continue
                try:
                    location_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_name = parts[1]
                    latitude = float(parts[2])
                    longitude = float(parts[3])
                    country = parts[4]
                    timezone = parts[5]
                    locations.append({
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'location_name': location_name,
                        'latitude': latitude,
                        'longitude': longitude,
                        'country': country,
                        'timezone': timezone
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return locations


def load_alerts():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'alerts.txt')
    alerts = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                try:
                    alert_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_id = int(parts[1])
                    alert_type = parts[2]
                    severity = parts[3]
                    description = parts[4]
                    start_time = parts[5]
                    end_time = parts[6]
                    is_acknowledged = parts[7] == '1'
                    alerts.append({
                        'alert_id': alert_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'alert_type': alert_type,
                        'severity': severity,
                        'description': description,
                        'start_time': start_time,
                        'end_time': end_time,
                        'is_acknowledged': is_acknowledged
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return alerts


def load_air_quality():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'air_quality.txt')
    air_quality_list = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                try:
                    aqi_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_id = int(parts[1])
                    aqi_index = int(parts[2])
                    pm25 = float(parts[3])
                    pm10 = float(parts[4])
                    no2 = float(parts[5])
                    o3 = float(parts[6])
                    last_updated = parts[7]
                    air_quality_list.append({
                        'aqi_id': aqi_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'aqi_index': aqi_index,
                        'pm25': pm25,
                        'pm10': pm10,
                        'no2': no2,
                        'o3': o3,
                        'last_updated': last_updated
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return air_quality_list


def load_saved_locations():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'saved_locations.txt')
    saved_locations = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 5:
                    continue
                try:
                    saved_id = int(parts[0])
                    user_id = int(parts[1])
                    if user_id != 1:
                        continue
                    location_id = int(parts[2])
                    location_name = parts[3]
                    is_default = parts[4] == '1'
                    saved_locations.append({
                        'saved_id': saved_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'location_name': location_name,
                        'is_default': is_default
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return saved_locations


def get_location_by_id(locations, location_id):
    for loc in locations:
        if loc['location_id'] == location_id:
            return loc
    return None


def get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, location_id):
    for cw in current_weather_list:
        if cw['location_id'] == location_id:
            return cw
    return None


@app.route('/')
def root_redirect():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))


@app.route('/dashboard', methods=['GET'])
def dashboard():
    saved_locations = load_saved_locations()
    default_location = None
    for loc in saved_locations:
        if loc['is_default']:
            default_location = loc
            break

    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()

    current_weather = None
    if default_location:
        current_weather = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, default_location['location_id'])

    if not current_weather and current_weather_list:
        current_weather = current_weather_list[0]

    if not current_weather:
        current_weather = {
            'location_id': None,
            'location_name': '',
            'temperature': None,
            'condition': '',
            'humidity': None,
            'wind_speed': None,
            'last_updated': ''
        }

    return render_template('dashboard.html', current_weather=current_weather)


@app.route('/weather/current/<int:location_id>', methods=['GET'])
def current_weather(location_id):
    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()
    cw = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, location_id)
    if cw is None:
        context = {
            'location_name': '',
            'temperature': None,
            'condition': '',
            'humidity': None,
            'wind_speed': None
        }
    else:
        context = {
            'location_name': cw['location_name'],
            'temperature': cw['temperature'],
            'condition': cw['condition'],
            'humidity': cw['humidity'],
            'wind_speed': cw['wind_speed']
        }
    return render_template('current_weather.html', **context)


@app.route('/forecast/weekly', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def weekly_forecast():
    locations = load_locations()
    forecasts = load_forecasts()

    selected_location_id = None
    if request.method == 'POST':
        loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_filter')
        if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():
            selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)

    locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]

    filtered_forecasts = []
    for fc in forecasts:
        if selected_location_id is None or fc['location_id'] == selected_location_id:
            filtered_forecasts.append({
                'date': fc['date'],
                'high_temp': fc['high_temp'],
                'low_temp': fc['low_temp'],
                'condition': fc['condition']
            })

    return render_template('weekly_forecast.html',
                           locations=locations_for_select,
                           selected_location_id=selected_location_id,
                           forecasts=filtered_forecasts)


@app.route('/locations/search', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def location_search():
    locations = load_locations()
    saved_locations = load_saved_locations()
    saved_locations_list = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in saved_locations]

    search_query = ''
    search_results = []

    if request.method == 'POST':
        search_query = request.form.get('search_query', '').strip()
        if search_query:
            for loc in locations:
                if search_query.lower() in loc['location_name'].lower():
                    search_results.append({
                        'location_id': loc['location_id'],
                        'location_name': loc['location_name'],
                        'latitude': loc['latitude'],
                        'longitude': loc['longitude'],
                        'country': loc['country']
                    })

    return render_template('location_search.html',
                           search_query=search_query,
                           search_results=search_results,
                           saved_locations=saved_locations_list)


@app.route('/alerts', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def weather_alerts():
    alerts = load_alerts()
    locations = load_locations()

    severity_filter = 'All'
    location_filter = None

    if request.method == 'POST':
        severity_filter_in = request.form.get('severity_filter')
        location_filter_in = request.form.get('location_filter')
        if severity_filter_in in ('All', 'Critical', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'):
            severity_filter = severity_filter_in
        if location_filter_in and location_filter_in.isdigit():
            location_filter = int(location_filter_in)
        else:
            location_filter = None

    filtered_alerts = []
    for alert in alerts:
        if severity_filter != 'All' and alert['severity'] != severity_filter:
            continue
        if location_filter is not None and alert['location_id'] != location_filter:
            continue
        location_name = ''
        loc = get_location_by_id(locations, alert['location_id'])
        if loc:
            location_name = loc['location_name']
        alert_copy = alert.copy()
        alert_copy['location_name'] = location_name
        filtered_alerts.append(alert_copy)

    return render_template('alerts.html',
                           alerts=filtered_alerts,
                           severity_filter=severity_filter,
                           location_filter=location_filter)


@app.route('/airquality', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def air_quality():
    locations = load_locations()
    air_quality_list = load_air_quality()

    selected_location_id = None
    if request.method == 'POST':
        loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_aqi_filter')
        if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():
            selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)

    locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]

    aqi_data = None
    if selected_location_id is not None:
        for aqi in air_quality_list:
            if aqi['location_id'] == selected_location_id:
                aqi_data = aqi
                break
    else:
        if air_quality_list:
            aqi_data = air_quality_list[0]

    if aqi_data is None:
        aqi_data = {
            'aqi_index': None,
            'aqi_description': '',
            'pm25': None,
            'pm10': None,
            'no2': None,
            'o3': None,
            'last_updated': ''
        }
    else:
        aqi_index = aqi_data['aqi_index']
        if aqi_index is None:
            aqi_description = ''
        elif aqi_index <= 50:
            aqi_description = 'Good'
        elif aqi_index <= 100:
            aqi_description = 'Moderate'
        elif aqi_index <= 150:
            aqi_description = 'Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups'
        elif aqi_index <= 200:
            aqi_description = 'Unhealthy'
        elif aqi_index <= 300:
            aqi_description = 'Very Unhealthy'
        else:
            aqi_description = 'Hazardous'
        aqi_data['aqi_description'] = aqi_description

    health_recommendation = ''
    if aqi_data['aqi_index'] is None:
        health_recommendation = 'No air quality data available.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 50:
        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is considered satisfactory, and air pollution poses little or no risk.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 100:
        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is acceptable; some pollutants may be a moderate health concern for a very small number of people.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 150:
        health_recommendation = 'Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects. General public is less likely to be affected.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 200:
        health_recommendation = 'Everyone may begin to experience health effects; members of sensitive groups may experience more serious effects.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 300:
        health_recommendation = 'Health warnings of emergency conditions. The entire population is more likely to be affected.'
    else:
        health_recommendation = 'Health alert: everyone may experience more serious health effects.'

    return render_template('air_quality.html',
                           locations=locations_for_select,
                           selected_location_id=selected_location_id,
                           aqi_data=aqi_data,
                           health_recommendation=health_recommendation)


@app.route('/locations/saved', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def saved_locations():
    saved_locations_raw = load_saved_locations()
    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()

    saved_locations_list = []
    for loc in saved_locations_raw:
        weather = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, loc['location_id'])
        current_temperature = weather['temperature'] if weather else None
        condition = weather['condition'] if weather else ''
        saved_locations_list.append({
            'location_id': loc['location_id'],
            'location_name': loc['location_name'],
            'current_temperature': current_temperature,
            'condition': condition,
            'is_default': loc['is_default']
        })

    return render_template('saved_locations.html', saved_locations=saved_locations_list)


@app.route('/settings', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def settings():
    temperature_units = ['Celsius', 'Fahrenheit', 'Kelvin']

    saved_locations_raw = load_saved_locations()
    saved_locations_list = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in saved_locations_raw]

    selected_unit = 'Celsius'
    default_location_id = None
    alert_notifications_enabled = False

    for loc in saved_locations_raw:
        if loc['is_default']:
            default_location_id = loc['location_id']
            break

    return render_template('settings.html',
                           temperature_units=temperature_units,
                           selected_unit=selected_unit,
                           saved_locations=saved_locations_list,
                           default_location_id=default_location_id,
                           alert_notifications_enabled=alert_notifications_enabled)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Weather Alerts</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="alerts-page">
        <h1>Weather Alerts</h1>
        <form method="POST">
            <label for="severity-filter">Filter by Severity:</label>
            <select id="severity-filter" name="severity_filter" onchange="this.form.submit()">
                {% for level in ['All', 'Critical', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'] %}
                    <option value="{{ level }}" {% if severity_filter == level %}selected{% endif %}>{{ level }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
            <label for="location-filter-alerts">Filter by Location:</label>
            <select id="location-filter-alerts" name="location_filter" onchange="this.form.submit()">
                <option value="" {% if location_filter is none %}selected{% endif %}>All Locations</option>
                {% for alert in alerts | map(attribute='location_id') | unique %}
                    {% set loc_id = alert %}
                    <option value="{{ loc_id }}" {% if location_filter == loc_id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ alerts | selectattr('location_id','equalto',loc_id) | first.location_name }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
        </form>

        <div id="alerts-list">
            {% for alert in alerts %}
                <div class="alert-entry" style="border:1px solid #000; margin:5px; padding:5px;">

                    <p><strong>Type:</strong> {{ alert.alert_type }}</p>
                    <p><strong>Severity:</strong> {{ alert.severity }}</p>
                    <p><strong>Description:</strong> {{ alert.description }}</p>
                    <p><strong>Start:</strong> {{ alert.start_time }}</p>
                    <p><strong>End:</strong> {{ alert.end_time }}</p>
                    <p><strong>Acknowledged:</strong> {{ 'Yes' if alert.is_acknowledged else 'No' }}</p>
                    {% if not alert.is_acknowledged %}
                    <form method="POST" style="display:inline;">
                        <input type="hidden" name="acknowledge_alert_id" value="{{ alert.alert_id }}" />
                        <button type="submit" id="acknowledge-alert-button-{{ alert.alert_id }}">Acknowledge</button>
                    </form>
                    {% endif %}
                </div>
            {% else %}
                <p>No alerts to display.</p>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">

</head>

                {% for location in locations %}
                    <option value="{{ location.location_id }}" {% if selected_location_id == location.location_id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ location.location_name }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
        </form>

        <table id="forecast-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Date</th>
                    <th>High Temp</th>
                    <th>Low Temp</th>
                    <th>Condition</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for forecast in forecasts %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ forecast.date }}</td>
                    <td>{{ forecast.high_temp }}</td>
                    <td>{{ forecast.low_temp }}</td>
                    <td>{{ forecast.condition }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <button id="back-to-dashboard" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('dashboard') }}'">Back to Dashboard</button>

from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request
import os

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'

DATA_DIR = 'data'

# Helper functions to load data files safely with error handling and proper parsing

def load_current_weather():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'current_weather.txt')
    current_weather_list = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 7:
                    continue
                try:
                    location_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_name = parts[1]
                    temperature = float(parts[2]) if '.' in parts[2] else int(parts[2])
                    condition = parts[3]
                    humidity = int(parts[4])
                    wind_speed = float(parts[5]) if '.' in parts[5] else int(parts[5])
                    last_updated = parts[6]
                    current_weather_list.append({
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'location_name': location_name,
                        'temperature': temperature,
                        'condition': condition,
                        'humidity': humidity,
                        'wind_speed': wind_speed,
                        'last_updated': last_updated
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return current_weather_list


def load_forecasts():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'forecasts.txt')
    forecasts = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                try:
                    forecast_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_id = int(parts[1])
                    date = parts[2]
                    high_temp = float(parts[3]) if '.' in parts[3] else int(parts[3])
                    low_temp = float(parts[4]) if '.' in parts[4] else int(parts[4])
                    condition = parts[5]
                    precipitation = int(parts[6])
                    humidity = int(parts[7])
                    forecasts.append({
                        'forecast_id': forecast_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'date': date,
                        'high_temp': high_temp,
                        'low_temp': low_temp,
                        'condition': condition,
                        'precipitation': precipitation,
                        'humidity': humidity
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return forecasts


def load_locations():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'locations.txt')
    locations = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 6:
                    continue
                try:
                    location_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_name = parts[1]
                    latitude = float(parts[2])
                    longitude = float(parts[3])
                    country = parts[4]
                    timezone = parts[5]
                    locations.append({
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'location_name': location_name,
                        'latitude': latitude,
                        'longitude': longitude,
                        'country': country,
                        'timezone': timezone
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return locations


def load_alerts():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'alerts.txt')
    alerts = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                try:
                    alert_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_id = int(parts[1])
                    alert_type = parts[2]
                    severity = parts[3]
                    description = parts[4]
                    start_time = parts[5]
                    end_time = parts[6]
                    is_acknowledged = parts[7] == '1'
                    alerts.append({
                        'alert_id': alert_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'alert_type': alert_type,
                        'severity': severity,
                        'description': description,
                        'start_time': start_time,
                        'end_time': end_time,
                        'is_acknowledged': is_acknowledged
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return alerts


def load_air_quality():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'air_quality.txt')
    air_quality_list = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                try:
                    aqi_id = int(parts[0])
                    location_id = int(parts[1])
                    aqi_index = int(parts[2])
                    pm25 = float(parts[3])
                    pm10 = float(parts[4])
                    no2 = float(parts[5])
                    o3 = float(parts[6])
                    last_updated = parts[7]
                    air_quality_list.append({
                        'aqi_id': aqi_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'aqi_index': aqi_index,
                        'pm25': pm25,
                        'pm10': pm10,
                        'no2': no2,
                        'o3': o3,
                        'last_updated': last_updated
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return air_quality_list


def load_saved_locations():
    filepath = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'saved_locations.txt')
    saved_locations = []
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 5:
                    continue
                try:
                    saved_id = int(parts[0])
                    user_id = int(parts[1])
                    if user_id != 1:
                        continue
                    location_id = int(parts[2])
                    location_name = parts[3]
                    is_default = parts[4] == '1'
                    saved_locations.append({
                        'saved_id': saved_id,
                        'location_id': location_id,
                        'location_name': location_name,
                        'is_default': is_default
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return []
    return saved_locations


def get_location_by_id(locations, location_id):
    for loc in locations:
        if loc['location_id'] == location_id:
            return loc
    return None


def get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, location_id):
    for cw in current_weather_list:
        if cw['location_id'] == location_id:
            return cw
    return None


@app.route('/')
def root_redirect():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))


@app.route('/dashboard', methods=['GET'])
def dashboard():
    saved_locations = load_saved_locations()
    default_location = None
    for loc in saved_locations:
        if loc['is_default']:
            default_location = loc
            break

    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()

    current_weather = None
    if default_location:
        current_weather = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, default_location['location_id'])

    if not current_weather and current_weather_list:
        current_weather = current_weather_list[0]

    if not current_weather:
        current_weather = {
            'location_id': None,
            'location_name': '',
            'temperature': None,
            'condition': '',
            'humidity': None,
            'wind_speed': None,
            'last_updated': ''
        }

    return render_template('dashboard.html', current_weather=current_weather)


@app.route('/weather/current/<int:location_id>', methods=['GET'])
def current_weather(location_id):
    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()
    cw = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, location_id)
    if cw is None:
        context = {
            'location_name': '',
            'temperature': None,
            'condition': '',
            'humidity': None,
            'wind_speed': None
        }
    else:
        context = {
            'location_name': cw['location_name'],
            'temperature': cw['temperature'],
            'condition': cw['condition'],
            'humidity': cw['humidity'],
            'wind_speed': cw['wind_speed']
        }
    return render_template('current_weather.html', **context)


@app.route('/forecast/weekly', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def weekly_forecast():
    locations = load_locations()
    forecasts = load_forecasts()

    selected_location_id = None
    if request.method == 'POST':
        loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_filter')
        if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():
            selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)

    locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]

    filtered_forecasts = []
    for fc in forecasts:
        if selected_location_id is None or fc['location_id'] == selected_location_id:
            filtered_forecasts.append({
                'date': fc['date'],
                'high_temp': fc['high_temp'],
                'low_temp': fc['low_temp'],
                'condition': fc['condition']
            })

    return render_template('weekly_forecast.html',
                           locations=locations_for_select,
                           selected_location_id=selected_location_id,
                           forecasts=filtered_forecasts)


@app.route('/locations/search', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def location_search():
    locations = load_locations()
    saved_locations = load_saved_locations()
    saved_locations_list = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in saved_locations]

    search_query = ''
    search_results = []

    if request.method == 'POST':
        search_query = request.form.get('search_query', '').strip()
        if search_query:
            for loc in locations:
                if search_query.lower() in loc['location_name'].lower():
                    search_results.append({
                        'location_id': loc['location_id'],
                        'location_name': loc['location_name'],
                        'latitude': loc['latitude'],
                        'longitude': loc['longitude'],
                        'country': loc['country']
                    })

    return render_template('location_search.html',
                           search_query=search_query,
                           search_results=search_results,
                           saved_locations=saved_locations_list)


@app.route('/alerts', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def weather_alerts():
    alerts = load_alerts()
    locations = load_locations()

    severity_filter = 'All'
    location_filter = None

    if request.method == 'POST':
        severity_filter_in = request.form.get('severity_filter')
        location_filter_in = request.form.get('location_filter')
        if severity_filter_in in ('All', 'Critical', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low'):
            severity_filter = severity_filter_in
        if location_filter_in and location_filter_in.isdigit():
            location_filter = int(location_filter_in)
        else:
            location_filter = None

    filtered_alerts = []
    for alert in alerts:
        if severity_filter != 'All' and alert['severity'] != severity_filter:
            continue
        if location_filter is not None and alert['location_id'] != location_filter:
            continue
        location_name = ''
        loc = get_location_by_id(locations, alert['location_id'])
        if loc:
            location_name = loc['location_name']
        alert_copy = alert.copy()
        alert_copy['location_name'] = location_name
        filtered_alerts.append(alert_copy)

    return render_template('alerts.html',
                           alerts=filtered_alerts,
                           severity_filter=severity_filter,
                           location_filter=location_filter)


@app.route('/airquality', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def air_quality():
    locations = load_locations()
    air_quality_list = load_air_quality()

    selected_location_id = None
    if request.method == 'POST':
        loc_id_str = request.form.get('location_aqi_filter')
        if loc_id_str and loc_id_str.isdigit():
            selected_location_id = int(loc_id_str)

    locations_for_select = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in locations]

    aqi_data = None
    if selected_location_id is not None:
        for aqi in air_quality_list:
            if aqi['location_id'] == selected_location_id:
                aqi_data = aqi
                break
    else:
        if air_quality_list:
            aqi_data = air_quality_list[0]

    if aqi_data is None:
        aqi_data = {
            'aqi_index': None,
            'aqi_description': '',
            'pm25': None,
            'pm10': None,
            'no2': None,
            'o3': None,
            'last_updated': ''
        }
    else:
        aqi_index = aqi_data['aqi_index']
        if aqi_index is None:
            aqi_description = ''
        elif aqi_index <= 50:
            aqi_description = 'Good'
        elif aqi_index <= 100:
            aqi_description = 'Moderate'
        elif aqi_index <= 150:
            aqi_description = 'Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups'
        elif aqi_index <= 200:
            aqi_description = 'Unhealthy'
        elif aqi_index <= 300:
            aqi_description = 'Very Unhealthy'
        else:
            aqi_description = 'Hazardous'
        aqi_data['aqi_description'] = aqi_description

    health_recommendation = ''
    if aqi_data['aqi_index'] is None:
        health_recommendation = 'No air quality data available.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 50:
        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is considered satisfactory, and air pollution poses little or no risk.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 100:
        health_recommendation = 'Air quality is acceptable; some pollutants may be a moderate health concern for a very small number of people.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 150:
        health_recommendation = 'Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects. General public is less likely to be affected.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 200:
        health_recommendation = 'Everyone may begin to experience health effects; members of sensitive groups may experience more serious effects.'
    elif aqi_data['aqi_index'] <= 300:
        health_recommendation = 'Health warnings of emergency conditions. The entire population is more likely to be affected.'
    else:
        health_recommendation = 'Health alert: everyone may experience more serious health effects.'

    return render_template('air_quality.html',
                           locations=locations_for_select,
                           selected_location_id=selected_location_id,
                           aqi_data=aqi_data,
                           health_recommendation=health_recommendation)


@app.route('/locations/saved', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def saved_locations():
    saved_locations_raw = load_saved_locations()
    current_weather_list = load_current_weather()

    saved_locations_list = []
    for loc in saved_locations_raw:
        weather = get_current_weather_by_location_id(current_weather_list, loc['location_id'])
        current_temperature = weather['temperature'] if weather else None
        condition = weather['condition'] if weather else ''
        saved_locations_list.append({
            'location_id': loc['location_id'],
            'location_name': loc['location_name'],
            'current_temperature': current_temperature,
            'condition': condition,
            'is_default': loc['is_default']
        })

    return render_template('saved_locations.html', saved_locations=saved_locations_list)


@app.route('/settings', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def settings():
    temperature_units = ['Celsius', 'Fahrenheit', 'Kelvin']

    saved_locations_raw = load_saved_locations()
    saved_locations_list = [{'location_id': loc['location_id'], 'location_name': loc['location_name']} for loc in saved_locations_raw]

    selected_unit = 'Celsius'
    default_location_id = None
    alert_notifications_enabled = False

    for loc in saved_locations_raw:
        if loc['is_default']:
            default_location_id = loc['location_id']
            break

    return render_template('settings.html',
                           temperature_units=temperature_units,
                           selected_unit=selected_unit,
                           saved_locations=saved_locations_list,
                           default_location_id=default_location_id,
                           alert_notifications_enabled=alert_notifications_enabled)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)
